title: Baby Mob Eyes
description: Makes the eyes of all baby mobs similar to their adult counterparts
body:
This pack makes the baby mobs have similar eyes to their adult counteparts.
<center>

![Cold, temperate and warm baby pigs on top of a flat surface of grass blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/19ukTQHg/images/a9d1534f6e856ed86b03606fd8ebba7d412658d5_350.webp)
![Baby nautilus on top of a flat surface of grass blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/19ukTQHg/images/8eec5d5d59eb8d84e8e37807d47a2ea3b1963a1b_350.webp)

</center>

For now, the following mob variants are included in the pack:
- Baby Cats <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby cats](https://i.imgur.com/PXjRCKH.png) </details>
  - Black
  - British Shorthair
  - Calico
  - Jellie
  - Persian
  - Ragdoll
  - Red
  - Siamese
  - Tabby
  - Tuxedo
  - White
- Baby Cows <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby cows](https://i.imgur.com/QoCIxAJ.png) </details>
  - Cold
  - Temperate
  - Warm
- Baby Mooshrooms <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby mooshrooms](https://i.imgur.com/8yEmaPY.png) </details>
  - Brown
  - Red
- Baby Nautilus <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby nautilus](https://i.imgur.com/ox5vt7B.png) </details>
- Baby Ocelot <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby ocelot](https://i.imgur.com/XvRlAZm.png) </details>
- Baby Pigs <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby pigs](https://i.imgur.com/f1mWv20.png) </details>
   - Cold
   - Temperate
   - Warm
- Baby Sheep (all colors) <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby sheep](https://i.imgur.com/s9uMuEH.png) </details>
- Baby Pale Wolf <details><summary>Screenshot</summary> ![baby pale wolf](https://i.imgur.com/Bpf8V4Q.png) </details>

Planned additions:
- Other Baby Wolf variants

**NOTE: This pack is still in beta because the current in-game changes are a work in progress. Baby Mob Eyes will leave beta after the final release of Java Edition 26.1.**
